zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Sharples於1630年1月30日出生在英國爾維布波瑞時，她的父親Geoffrey Sharples44歲，母親Margaret Ashley44歲。她於1671年與Richard Caldwell在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1703年2月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Sharples于1630年1月30日出生在英国爾維布波瑞时，她的父亲Geoffrey Sharples44岁，母亲Margaret Ashley44岁。她于1671年与Richard Caldwell在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1703年2月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sharples
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Sharples (Lancashire). The etymology of the placename is uncertain; it may derive from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed, steep’ + lǣs ‘meadow’ or lēas, plural of lēah ‘wood, woodland, clearing’, or from scearpol ‘place characterized by a pointed feature, pointed hill’.

variants.name: Sharpley
meanings: habitational name from Sharplow in Tissington (Derbyshire), from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed’ + hlāw ‘hill, mound’.
variant of Sharples with loss of -s.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Sharples was born on 30 January 1630, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, her father, Geoffrey Sharples, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Ashley, was 44. She married Richard Caldwell in 1671, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 23 February 1703, in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Sharples est née le 30 janvier 1630, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Sharples, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ashley, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Caldwell en 1671, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 février 1703, à Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Sharples am 30. Januar 1630 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey Sharples 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ashley 44. Sie hat 1671 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Caldwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. Februar 1703 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Sharples è nata il il 30 gennaio 1630 nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Geoffrey Sharples, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Ashley, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Richard Caldwell nel 1671, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 23 febbraio 1703, nel Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Sharplesが1630年1月30日にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Sharplesは44歳，母Margaret Ashleyは44歳であった。1671年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーでRichard Caldwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1703年2月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Sharples(이)가 1630년 1월 30일 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Sharples(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ashley(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1671년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에서 Richard Caldwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1703년 2월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.30 January 1630–23 February 1703: 30 de janeiro de 1630–23 de fevereiro de 1703
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Sharples nasceu em 30 de janeiro de 1630, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey Sharples, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ashley, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Caldwell em 1671, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1703, em Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Sharples родилась 30 января 1630 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Sharples было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ashley, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Caldwell в 1671 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 февраля 1703 г. в местности Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.

es.30 January 1630–23 February 1703: 30 de enero de 1630–23 de febrero de 1703
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Sharples nació el 30 de enero de 1630, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey Sharples, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Ashley, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Richard Caldwell en 1671, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 23 de febrero de 1703, en Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años.
